families.repair_summary: Unified feedback and score stimulus semantics; checker now derives mixer polarity/metric checks from observed reset, clock, and input regions with structured redacted diagnostics.
Unified sample/hold stimulus semantics; checker now derives sample, droop, and reset observations from public events with structured redacted diagnostics.
Checker now uses observed hysteresis regions and stable metric percentiles instead of absolute windows, preserving gold acceptance under EVAS2.
Checker and harness semantics now follow observed calibration clock/reset events and emit property-scoped diagnostics.
Comparator checker now evaluates public differential sweep behavior without hidden absolute timeline assumptions.
UVLO checker now derives threshold and latch behavior from observed voltage/reset regions with structured diagnostics.
Window comparator checker now judges the public window function on a common sampled grid rather than raw breakpoint counts.
Wide thermometer decoder checker now uses stable input-vector rows, fast raw-signal normalization, and behavioral diagnostics for count/order/enable failures.
Wide thermometer encoder checker now uses stable thermometer-vector rows and fast raw-signal normalization to avoid timeout-based evidence.
ADC checker now samples distinct stable input plateaus, including out-of-range clamp plateaus, and reports clamp-specific failures.
